rectified_nodes.fix_description: Replaced control_flow with data_flow for edge b2 -> b5, assuming b2 produces data for b5.
Replaced control_flow with data_flow for edge b3 -> b4, as a call node produces data for a return.
Connected b4 to b3 via data_flow, as b3 (call) is the nearest logical data producer for b4 (return).
